creator: kempe81@outlook.com
text:
Using the latest gnome 3.16 from packages. If i try to load gnome-system-monitor it doesn't start. Running it through the terminal i get the following message:


(<unknown>:1280): glibmm-CRITICAL **: 
unhandled exception (type Glib::Error) in signal handler:
domain: g-io-error-quark
code  : 0
what  : Unable to find default local directory monitor type

LibGTop-Server: pid 1281 received eof.
